zh.lifeSummary: 當Osbert de Clinton於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾時，他的父親Osbert de Clinton27歲，母親Margaret de Hatton24歲。他於1205年與Elisant d' Amington在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1222年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osbert de Clinton于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾可爾希爾时，他的父亲Osbert de Clinton27岁，母亲Margaret de Hatton24岁。他于1205年与Elisant d' Amington在英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1222年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Osbert de Clinton was born about 1180, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Osbert de Clinton, was 27 and his mother, Margaret de Hatton, was 24. He married Elisant d' Amington in 1205, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1222, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osbert de Clinton est né environ 1180, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Osbert de Clinton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Hatton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elisant d' Amington en 1205, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1222, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osbert de Clinton um 1180 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert de Clinton 27 und seine Mutter Margaret de Hatton 24. Er hat 1205 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England Elisant d' Amington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1222 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osbert de Clinton è nato il circa 1180 nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Osbert de Clinton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Hatton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elisant d' Amington nel 1205, nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1222, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert de Clinton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Hatton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1205년 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에서 Elisant d' Amington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.
